final_prompt.prompt:
Create an original, non-infringing PPT cover slide for a domestic China fundraising roadshow announcing the GPT-5.5 launch, with 奥特曼 as the speaker.

Style/medium: needs a high-stakes GP/LP roadshow deck aesthetic — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: must be a single landscape slide cover layout with clear title hierarchy, speaker name, and event context
Subject: must include GPT-5.5 launch announcement framing, speaker credit for 奥特曼
Scene/backdrop: needs a premium tech-finance backdrop — exact environment is yours
Lighting/mood: needs a confident, authoritative, forward-looking atmosphere — exact light treatment is yours
Color palette: needs a direction that blends Silicon Valley tech prestige with China domestic roadshow formality — exact palette is yours
Materials/textures: needs a polished, professional surface treatment — exact finish is yours
Text (verbatim): must include "GPT-5.5" (primary headline), "奥特曼" (speaker name), and roadshow/融资宣发 context labels as appropriate
Constraints: must conform to China domestic GP/LP roadshow deck conventions — layout, tone, and information hierarchy should reflect 国内路演 norms
Avoid: overly casual or consumer-app aesthetics; must avoid generic tech startup clichés
